elements.name: Bob wants to create a new zaak

steps.name: "Bob" wants to create a new zaak
"Bob" sees the created zaak with a delay
"Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/zaken/werkvoorraad" with delay after of 5000 ms

elements.name: Resident fills in indienen-aansprakelijkheid-behandelen open-forms form

steps.name: Resident "Alice" fills in the indienen-aansprakelijkheid-behandelen open-forms form
Employee "Bob" clicks on the first zaak in the zaak-werkvoorraad with delay
Employee "Bob" sees the zaak that "Alice" created in open-forms

elements.name: Employee wants to create a new document for a zaak

steps.name: Employee "Bob" is on the newly created zaak with status "Intake"
Employee "Bob" clicks on Create Document for zaak
Employee "Bob" should not get an error

elements.name: Employee "Bob" does not have enough information to finish Intake and assigns a task to Employee "Oscar"

steps.name: Employee "Bob" is on the newly created zaak with status "Intake"
Employee "Bob" does not have enough information to finish Intake and assigns a task to Employee "Oscar"
Employee "Oscar" sees the task assigned to Employee "Bob" in my task list
Employee "Oscar" is on the newly created zaak with status "Intake"
Employee "Oscar" sees the task assigned by Employee "Bob" in the newly created zaak tasks list

elements.name: Bob distributes zaken to a group

steps.name: "Bob" distributes the zaken to the first group available
"Bob" gets a message confirming that the distribution of zaken is complete
